info.description: This is the swagger specification for Tsunammi API.
info.title: Tsunammi API

get.description: Returns all exchange accounts for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new exchange account

get.description: Returns a specific exchange account by its ID, for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a specific exchange account by its ID, for the authenticated user.

post.description: Refreshes the access and refresh token pair using an existing refresh token.
Generates and sends a one-time code to the specified email address.

400.description: Bad Request or invalid email format

post.description: Authenticates a user with an email and code, returning JWT access and refresh tokens.

200.description: Successful sign-in. Returns a user object and JWT info

400.description: Bad Request or invalid email format

404.description: User with this email not found

post.description: Authenticates an existing user via a Google ID token and returns JWT tokens.

200.description: Successful sign-in. Returns a user object and JWT info

post.description: Authenticates a user by verifying a signed message from their Solana wallet. If the user does not exist, a new one is created.
post.summary: Sign in or register with Solana wallet

parameters.description: Public key and signed message(public key) for verification
parameters.name: request

200.description: Successful sign-in or registration. Returns user data and JWT tokens

400.description: Bad Request (e.g., missing public key or signature)

post.description: Creates a new user by verifying an email and confirmation code.

500.description: Internal Server Error (e.g., user already exists)

post.description: Creates a new user based on a Google ID token.

401.description: Email not found in locals or invalid token

500.description: Internal Server Error (e.g., user already exists)

get.description: Returns all buyback campaigns for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new smart buyback campaign with one or more targets.

delete.description: Stops an active buyback target by its UUID.

patch.description: Partially updates a buyback target. Only provided fields are applied.

get.description: Returns a buyback campaign with its targets by UUID.

delete.description: Stops an active buyback campaign by its UUID.

post.description: Adds a new target to an existing buyback campaign. Maximum 5 targets per campaign.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of transactions for a buyback campaign. Optionally filtered by target ID.
Returns all campaigns associated with the authenticated user.
Returns a statistical summary of all campaigns for the authenticated user (e.g., total spent, active count).
Returns a specific campaign by its UUID for the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates configuration for a specific campaign.

delete.description: Stops an active campaign by its UUID.

get.description: Returns a list of transactions associated with a specific campaign.
Returns the current tip floor information from Jito.

post.description: Returns total expected token amount, hardcoded creation fee in SOL, configured Jito tip in SOL, total priority fee in SOL, and all remaining Pumpfun commissions as one SOL value.
Verifies signed launch transactions for a pending Pumpfun launch and broadcasts them as a bundle.
Uploads token metadata, builds the unsigned Pumpfun create transaction and optional initial buy transactions, then stores pending launch state.
Creates a new project

get.description: Returns a project by its ID

delete.description: Deletes a project by its ID

post.description: Estimates the cost and impact of a Pumpfun pull operation.
Creates a new target pull-down campaign on Pumpfun to decrease token price.
Creates a new target pull-up campaign on Pumpfun to increase token price.
Estimates the cost and impact of a Raydium pull operation.
Creates a new target pull-down campaign on Raydium to decrease token price.
Creates a new target pull-up campaign on Raydium to increase token price.
Uploads an image file to decentralized storage via Lighthouse and returns its IPFS CID and gateway URL
Serializes an arbitrary JSON object and uploads it as metadata.json to decentralized storage via Lighthouse, returning its IPFS CID and gateway URL

parameters.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata object (must not be empty)
parameters.name: body

400.description: Bad Request — invalid or empty body

get.description: Returns the profile data for the user authenticated via a JWT access token.

patch.description: Updates the email address of the authenticated user. Requires a valid confirmation code sent to the new email.

400.description: Invalid request data or email format

get.description: Returns a list of actions (history) for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new Solana deposit request

get.description: Returns the deposit history for the authenticated user.
Returns the deposit history for a specific project ID, owned by the authenticated user.
get.summary: Get deposit history by project ID

post.description: Processes a previously created deposit order by its ID.
Returns the current status of a deposit by its ID
Generates a specified number of new Solana wallets and associates them with project IDs.
Imports existing Solana wallets using a list of private keys.
Imports Solana wallets from a text file (.txt) containing private keys (one key per line).

parameters.description: Text file with private keys (one per line)
parameters.name: file

parameters.description: JSON array of project IDs to associate wallets with.
parameters.name: project_ids

post.description:
Starts monitoring of provided Solana wallets or updates monitoring settings.
This endpoint allows adding wallets to the monitoring service to track their activity.

get.description: Fetches the private key for a given wallet ID.
get.summary: Get private key by wallet ID

delete.description: Deletes a Solana wallet by ID along with its associated secrets.

buy_transaction.description: base64 encoded, unsigned; empty when owner buy is zero

create_transaction.description: base64 encoded, partially signed (mint only); contains Jito tip

signed_buy_tx.description: base64 encoded, owner-signed; required when buy_transaction is not empty

model.UploadImageResponse.description: IPFS upload result for an image file

model.UploadMetadataRequest.description: Arbitrary metadata object to be uploaded as metadata.json (must not be empty)

model.UploadMetadataResponse.description: IPFS upload result for a metadata.json file

BearerAuth.description: Type 'Bearer' followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
